text: PR #112 addresses 13 of 14 audit findings from issue #111 across 11 files, covering form validation (setValueAs conversion, blog content max/refine), accessibility (aria-describedby, error element ids, disabled states), UX (beforeunload warning), and schema consistency (ConsentSchema boolean refinement, StaffProfileSchema import). The changes are clean, focused, and introduce no regressions. One finding is partially addressed (EventSeriesForm firstEventDate and capacity still lack disabled during submission), and the beforeunload handler fires unconditionally rather than gating on isDirty.

reasoning: One IMPORTANT audit finding is partially addressed: EventSeriesForm's firstEventDate (line 304) and capacity (line 328) inputs don't use the field() helper and remain editable during submission. Additionally, the beforeunload handler fires unconditionally without checking formState.isDirty. These are straightforward to fix.

message: Elegant schema fix combining .min(1), .max(50000), and HTML-strip refine into a reusable ContentSchema, shared between Create and Update schemas. This correctly prevents both empty strings and visually-empty rich text from passing validation.

Replacing z.literal(true) with z.boolean().refine(v => v === true, ...) properly resolves the type hack on consent/page.tsx line 59 where 'false as never' was previously required. Runtime behavior is identical but types are now correct.
Contact form receives both disabled={isSubmitting} and aria-describedby on all four fields, plus matching id attributes on error paragraphs. This is a thorough accessibility improvement.
Disabled styling (opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed) is added to the inputCls helper and disabled={mutation.isPending} is applied to all 7 form fields consistently.
Removed inline StaffProfileSchema definition and switched to importing from @/lib/shared, eliminating schema drift (the inline version was missing department and designation fields).
firstEventDate input does not use the field() helper and lacks disabled={isSubmitting}. The audit specifically flagged this field as remaining editable during submission.
suggestion: Add disabled={isSubmitting} to the firstEventDate input at line 304, matching the pattern used in EventForm's eventDate field.

message: capacity input does not use the field() helper and lacks disabled={isSubmitting}. The audit specifically flagged this field as remaining editable during submission.
suggestion: Add disabled={isSubmitting} to the capacity input at line 328.

message: beforeunload handler fires unconditionally on all navigation attempts, even when there are no unsaved changes. The audit suggested gating on formState.isDirty.
suggestion: Destructure isDirty from useForm's formState and conditionally add/remove the beforeunload listener based on its value.
